## Highlights

- **Share a Nomad page with other Reticulum users** (parity with `android-v1.2.14`) — new "Share" toolbar action on the Nomad page view hands the upstream-standard `<destHash>:/path` cross-node link to the system share sheet. Pasteable into any NomadNet client.
- **Tap a `<destHash>:/path` link inside an LXMF message** — the linkifier now recognises NomadNet cross-node links alongside `http(s)://`. Bare 32-char hashes are deliberately left alone (too ambiguous with LXMF contact hashes); only forms with an explicit `nnn@` prefix or an explicit `:/path` suffix become tappable. Tapping switches to the Nomad tab and loads the page directly — destinations the receiver has never seen are added as manual stubs so path-discovery starts before the fetch. `OpenNomadPageEvent` mirrors the existing `OpenContactEvent` / `OpenRrcHubEvent` deep-link plumbing.
- **ASCII-art Nomad pages stop wrapping** — 80-col banner art (box-drawing characters, `====` rulers, ASCII typeface) tuned for desktop terminals used to wrap and lose its shape at phone width. The renderer now classifies each Literal block (heuristic: box-drawing chars OR ruler patterns OR wide+high-density), measures the available width via `GeometryReader`, and scales the monospace font down so the widest line fits. Clamped at a 6 pt legibility floor. Plain code-style Literal blocks are untouched.
